arts.ttl: Sources: Real Madrid eyeing shock move for untouchable Man City ace
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to test the waters this January with an offer for Man City ace, Savinho, a player his club say is untouchable. arts.ttl: Manchester United have finally got something that Liverpool, Man City and Arsenal have
arts.sum: Man Utd progressed to the next round of the FA Cup by winning a penalty shootout against Arsenal at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City travel to Brentford in the Premier League on Tuesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Man City closing in on deal to sign Palmeiras centre back Vitor Reis with club set to complete £100m triple swoop in January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester City are close to agreement with Palmeiras for centre back Vitor Reis after a breakthrough in talks on Monday.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola's side 'verbally agree' deal to sign key target 'immediately' with medical scheduled
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly reach a verbal agreement with Palmeiras to sign highly-rated defender Vitor Reis, who is set to undergo a medical.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confident he can find replacement if Kyle Walker leaves Man City
arts.sum: The veteran right-back has told the club he wants to move and play the final years of his career abroad.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains why he is 'too clever' to be worried by Kyle Walker saga

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Premier League title warning as he judges Man City comeback hopes
arts.sum: Liverpool face Nottingham Forest on Tuesday night in huge clash in the Premier League title race but Arne Slot does not believe the defending champions are finished yet

arts.ttl: Guardiola admits regrets after reining in Manchester City signings last summer
arts.sum: Injuries make manager wonder if error was made City signed only Savinho and Ilkay Gündogan Pep Guardiola turned down the option of strengthening Manchester City considerably last summer when it was offered and he is wondering whether this was an error. City have won their past three games, after only one victory in the previous 13 matches. A major factor in the loss of form was the number of injuries. Continue reading...
